actionable_lessons: Execution quality and inventory control are part of the strategy, not separate concerns.
Model late-entry and adverse-selection risk explicitly.
anti_patterns: This paper is not a blueprint for blindly market making in Polymarket.
Do not import continuous-market assumptions without adaptation.
body:
Actionable lessons:
- Execution quality and inventory control are part of the strategy, not separate concerns.
- Model late-entry and adverse-selection risk explicitly.

What it does not justify:
- This paper is not a blueprint for blindly market making in Polymarket.
- Do not import continuous-market assumptions without adaptation.
citation: High-frequency Trading in a Limit Order Book (https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/14697680701381228)
summary: Canonical paper on high-frequency execution, inventory risk, and quoting in limit-order-book markets.
title: High-frequency Trading in a Limit Order Book
